Name: Bloom
Description: Applies color grading using lookup tables (LUTs) to remap scene colors for artistic or cinematic effects. Supports smooth transitions between grading profiles over time.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Luminance
Fields.Description: Additional bloom intensity control specific to Yebis processing.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold for bloom extraction in Yebis pipeline.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Sampling Threshold
Fields.Description: Controls sampling cutoff when extracting bright regions.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Remap Factor
Fields.Description: Remaps brightness values before bloom processing.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Star Length FOV Dependence
Fields.Description: Adjusts star streak length based on camera field of view.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Star Fileter Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold for generating star-shaped glare artifacts.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Star Softness
Fields.Description: Controls softness of star-shaped glare streaks.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Shape
Fields.Description: Selects glare shape pattern (e.g., star, cross, circular).

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Number of Levels
Fields.Description: Number of blur levels used in Yebis bloom.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Bloom Gaussian Radius Scale
Fields.Description: Controls blur radius scaling for Yebis bloom.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Bloom Luminance Gamma
Fields.Description: Gamma adjustment applied to bloom luminance.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Glare Ghost Concentric Distortion
Fields.Description: Controls radial distortion of lens ghost artifacts.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Glare Luminance
Fields.Description: Controls brightness of glare component in custom bloom.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Bloom Luminance
Fields.Description: Controls brightness of bloom component.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Bloom Dispersion
Fields.Description: Controls color separation within bloom.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Bloom Dispersion Base Level
Fields.Description: Base level where dispersion begins.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Ghost Luminance
Fields.Description: Brightness of ghosting artifacts.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Ghost Halo Luminance
Fields.Description: Intensity of halo around ghost artifacts.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Ghost Distortion
Fields.Description: Distortion applied to ghost artifacts.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Ghost Sharpness
Fields.Description: Sharpness of ghost reflections.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Luminance
Fields.Description: Brightness of star-shaped glare.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Streaks
Fields.Description: Number of streaks in star glare.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Length
Fields.Description: Length of star streaks.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Secondary Length
Fields.Description: Length of secondary streaks.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Rotation
Fields.Description: Rotation of star streak pattern.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Inclination Angle
Fields.Description: Angle of star streak tilt.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Dispersion
Fields.Description: Color dispersion across star streaks.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Star Force Dispersion
Fields.Description: Forces dispersion effect regardless of brightness.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Afterimage Luminance
Fields.Description: Intensity of trailing afterimage effect.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Custom Bloom: Afterimage Length
Fields.Description: Length of afterimage trails.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Enable Anamorphic Lens
Fields.Description: Enables anamorphic lens flare effects.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Anamorphic Flare Luminance
Fields.Description: Intensity of anamorphic flare streaks.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Anamorphic Flare Ghost Luminance Scale
Fields.Description: Scales brightness of ghost artifacts in anamorphic flares.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Anamorphic Flare Color
Fields.Description: Color tint applied to anamorphic flares.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Anamorphic Ghost Color
Fields.Description: Color of ghost artifacts in anamorphic lens simulation.

Fields.Name: Enable Bloom
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the bloom (glare) effect. When disabled, bright areas will not produce light bleed.

Fields.Name: Glare: Number of Levels
Fields.Description: Number of downsampled blur levels used in the bloom pyramid. Higher values produce wider, softer bloom at increased performance cost.

Fields.Name: Glare: Luminance
Fields.Description: Overall intensity multiplier for the bloom effect. Controls how strongly bright areas contribute to glare.

Fields.Name: Glare: Threshold
Fields.Description: Brightness threshold for bloom extraction. Only pixels above this value will contribute to the bloom effect.

Fields.Name: Glare: Bloom Alpha
Fields.Description: Blend factor controlling how much of the blurred bloom is composited back onto the final image.

Fields.Name: Glare: Bloom Gaussian Radius Scale
Fields.Description: Scale factor applied to the Gaussian blur radius. Higher values result in wider and softer bloom spread.

Fields.Name: Glare: Bloom Saturation Control
Fields.Description: Controls color saturation of the bloom effect. Lower values desaturate bloom toward white, while higher values preserve original color.

Fields.Name: Glare: Bloom Smoothing
Fields.Description: Controls smoothness of bloom blending across levels. Higher values reduce harsh transitions between blur layers.
